message:
fix(console): prevent terminal line wrapping with ANSI-aware width truncation

- Add visible width accounting for leading space in info row format
- Implement truncate_to_vis_width() that properly handles ANSI escape
  sequences, truncates to visible character budget, and appends ellipsis
- Clamp JSON and result lines to content_max = terminal_width - 2
  to prevent border garbling from long values
- Add regression test verifying rendered lines never exceed 80 visible
  characters including 2-char border overhead

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
